metadata.title: I Want to Know What Love Is (1999 Remaster)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:14.46] I've gotta take a little time
[00:18.81] A little time to think things over
[00:22.75] 
[00:27.64] I better read between the lines
[00:32.02] In case I need it when I'm older
[00:36.76] 
[00:40.18] (Whoa, ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh)
[00:50.01] And this mountain, I must climb
[00:54.35] Feels like the world upon my shoulders
[01:00.48] And through the clouds, I see love shine
[01:04.73] It keeps me warm as life grows colder
[01:10.49] In my life, there's been heartache and pain
[01:16.95] I don't know if I can face it again
[01:23.26] Can't stop now, I've travelled so far
[01:28.51] To change this lonely life
[01:33.50] 
[01:35.88] I wanna know what love is
[01:40.03] 
[01:42.17] I want you to show me
[01:47.69] I wanna feel what love is
[01:51.82] 
[01:54.01] I know you can show me
[01:58.25] 
[02:00.40] Oh, oh-oh, oh (ooh)
[02:05.17] 
[02:08.72] I'm gonna take a little time
[02:13.09] A little time to look around me
[02:19.36] I've got nowhere left to hide
[02:23.42] It looks like love has finally found me
[02:28.63] In my life, there's been heartache and pain
[02:35.75] I don't know if I can face it again
[02:42.00] I can't stop now, I've travelled so far
[02:47.41] To change this lonely life
[02:54.34] I wanna know what love is
[02:57.87] 
[03:00.60] I want you to show me
[03:06.24] I wanna feel what love is
[03:10.43] 
[03:12.52] I know you can show me
[03:18.27] I wanna know what love is
[03:22.05] 
[03:24.41] I want you to show me
[03:28.23] (I wanna feel) I wanna feel what love is
[03:34.02] (I know) I know you can show me
[03:38.58] 
[03:42.53] Let's talk about love (I wanna know what love is)
[03:47.51] Love that you feel inside (I want you to show me)
[03:54.24] I'm feeling so much love (I wanna feel what love is)
[03:59.58] Oh, you know, you just can't hide (I know you can show me)
[04:05.79] 
[04:07.90] (Oh, yeah)
[04:10.88] I wanna know what love is (let's talk about love)
[04:17.38] I know you can show me
[04:21.56] (I wanna feel it too)
[04:22.64] I wanna feel what love is (oh, I wanna feel it too)
[04:27.49] (And I know, and I know)
[04:29.34] I know you can show me (show me love is real, yeah), yeah!
[04:36.11] (Yeah-yeah) I wanna know what love is (I wanna know)
[04:44.09] I want you to show me (and I wanna know, I wanna know, wanna know)
[04:50.15] I wanna feel what love is (I wanna feel)
[04:55.92] I know you can show me
[04:57.02]
